name: Spicy Star Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the margarine, honey, sugar, and eggs together in a bowl until smooth and fluffy.
2. Add the remaining ingredients (flour, baking powder, cinnamon, nutmeg, cloves, and apple juice) and mix well until combined.
3. Divide the dough into thirds. Flatten each one into a circle about 1/2 inch thick.
4. Refrigerate overnight until firm.
5. Remove the dough from the refrigerator and roll out on a lightly floured surface to 1/8 inch thick.
6. Cut out the dough with a star cookie cutter and place on a lightly oiled baking sheet.
7. Bake in a 375°F oven for 8 to 10 minutes, or until lightly browned.
Note: One serving of 2 cookies contains approximately 78 calories and about 3/4 teaspoon of sugar.
